name: Windows Shortcut Following (.LNK)
description: The product opens a file or directory without properly handling that it may be a Windows shortcut (.LNK) file whose target resolves to a location outside the intended control sphere, allowing attackers to access unauthorized files.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a filename that may be a .LNK shortcut file, which flows to STORAGE[file_access] where the OS resolves the shortcut target outside the intended directory, without a CONTROL node that detects .LNK files and validates or rejects shortcut resolution
